party_roster.first_evidence_text: representatives of Thoma Bravo informally approached and had brief meetings with representatives of the Company, and expressed Thoma Bravo's potential interest in exploring a possible business transaction with the Company.

These parties included a telecommunications enterprise company ("Strategic 1"), two large software companies ("Strategic 2" and "Strategic 3") and three financial sponsors ("Sponsor A," "Sponsor B" and Thoma Bravo).

party_roster.actor_notes: One financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing confidentiality agreement; not individually identified
party_roster.first_evidence_text: Except for one financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing its confidentiality agreement, each party that entered into a confidentiality agreement attended a high-level management presentation.
The advisory committee authorized Company management to inquire whether Barclays would be available to act as a financial advisor to the Company in connection with a potential strategic transaction.
Members of Company management, Chip Linnemann, a consultant to the Company, and representatives of the Company's outside legal counsel, Goodwin Procter LLP ("Goodwin"), were in attendance.
On July 7, 2016, Thoma Bravo's outside counsel, Kirkland & Ellis LLP ("Kirkland") sent a revised draft of the merger agreement to Goodwin.

party_roster.actor_notes: Consultant to the Company; liaison between Special Committee and Barclays
party_roster.first_evidence_text: Members of Company management, Chip Linnemann, a consultant to the Company, and representatives of the Company's outside legal counsel, Goodwin Procter LLP ("Goodwin"), were in attendance.

party_roster.actor_notes: Independent directors: David Barrett, Paul Maeder, Kate Walsh, Jack Blaeser, Dr. John Halamka, Rodger Weismann
party_roster.first_evidence_text: every conversation among the Board, the Special Committee (as defined below), members of Company management or the Company's representatives and other parties.

count_assertions.assertion_text: Barclays contacted and had discussions with the 15 potentially interested parties discussed by the Board at its April 28 and May 5, 2016 meetings, including Thoma Bravo.
count_assertions.source_text: During the period from May 6 through June 9, 2016, at the direction of the Board, Barclays contacted and had discussions with the 15 potentially interested parties discussed by the Board at its April 28 and May 5, 2016 meetings, including Thoma Bravo.

count_assertions.assertion_text: Of the parties contacted, three strategic parties and four financial sponsors executed confidentiality agreements with the Company, including Thoma Bravo on May 10, 2016.
count_assertions.source_text: Of the parties contacted, three strategic parties and four financial sponsors executed confidentiality agreements with the Company, including Thoma Bravo on May 10, 2016.

count_assertions.assertion_text: Representatives of Barclays reviewed with the Board an indicative list of parties which Barclays believed would be potentially interested in pursuing a business combination transaction involving the Company, including 11 strategic companies and four financial sponsors, including Thoma Bravo.
count_assertions.source_text: Representatives of Barclays reviewed with the Board an indicative list of parties which Barclays believed would be potentially interested in pursuing a business combination transaction involving the Company, including 11 strategic companies and four financial sponsors, including Thoma Bravo.

count_assertions.assertion_text: On June 9, 2016, three parties (Sponsor A, Sponsor B and Thoma Bravo) presented written preliminary non-binding indications of interest that were each subject to satisfactory completion of due diligence, among other conditions.
count_assertions.source_text: On June 9, 2016, three parties (Sponsor A, Sponsor B and Thoma Bravo) presented written preliminary non-binding indications of interest that were each subject to satisfactory completion of due diligence, among other conditions.

count_assertions.assertion_text: Except for one financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing its confidentiality agreement, each party that entered into a confidentiality agreement attended a high-level management presentation conducted by members of Company management and attended by Barclays.
count_assertions.source_text: Except for one financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing its confidentiality agreement, each party that entered into a confidentiality agreement attended a high-level management presentation conducted by members of Company management and attended by Barclays. These parties included a telecommunications enterprise company ("Strategic 1"), two large software companies ("Strategic 2" and "Strategic 3") and three financial sponsors ("Sponsor A," "Sponsor B" and Thoma Bravo).

explanations.detail: Seven strategic parties contacted but declined before NDA; not individually identified in chronology
